race.comment: Chances galore. Settled on BEAU BANDIT (4) after his game effort to finish a close fourth last start in a 1200m Provincial Championship qualifier at Gosford. Cherry ripe after two runs back from a spell and he saves his best form for Newcastle. The lightly raced FUADEE (6) returned from a 12-week spell with a tidy win in a BM64 over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Has only missed the frame once and that was in town off a five-week lay-off. Should run another big race. HOPPER (3) may not have handled the soft ground according to the stable when a disappointing ninth at Wyong recently. Nice winner over 1400m at Kembla prior to that run. Worth another chance. RAJWA (10) comes here off a six-week let-up. Form so far this prep has all been at Canterbury and is impressive. Comes in a little down the order due to a poor gate. THE GREAT HOUDINI (2) opened last prep with a win in town so he must be respected first-up from a 14-week spell.
